lines.text: Contract assets of $500000000 (current) and contract liabilities of $1200000000 (current) disclosed per ASC 606 606-10-45-1, 606-10-45-5.
Deferred revenue rollforward: beginning $1100000000, deferred $4500000000, recognized $4200000000, ending $1400000000 per ASC 606 606-10-45-1, 606-10-45-5.
SaaS revenue disaggregated by category (subscription: $10000000000; professional_services: $1500000000; usage_based: $500000000) per ASC 606 606-10-50-5, 606-10-55-89, 606-10-55-91.
Capitalized cost to obtain contracts of $800000000 with amortization of $650000000 per ASC 340-40 340-40-25-1, 340-40-35-1.
Transaction price allocated to performance obligations (subscription license: $9000000000; support services: $3000000000) per ASC 606 606-10-32-31, 606-10-50-13.
Remaining performance obligations of $25000000000, including $12000000000 expected within twelve months, per ASC 606 606-10-50-13, 606-10-50-14.
Variable consideration of $120000000 constrained (highly probable threshold applied to usage-based fees) per ASC 606 606-10-32-11, 606-10-50-20.
Entity reports as principal for SaaS marketplace transactions per ASC 606 606-10-55-36, 606-10-55-40.
